title: Auth Service Jwt Expired
description: auth-service experiencing JWT_EXPIRED errors. Error rate spiked to 11.4% under elevated traffic; upstream calls from api-gateway began failing shortly after.
resolution: Rolled back auth-service to stable version; Adjusted circuit breaker; Verified healthchecks and cleared backlog
rca_summary: Cascade failure initiated by traffic spike causing JWT_EXPIRED. Resolved via tuning timeouts. Added monitoring to prevent recurrence.

title: User Db Max Connections
description: user-db experiencing MAX_CONNECTIONS errors. Error rate spiked to 14.1% under elevated traffic; upstream calls from auth-service began failing shortly after.
resolution: Rolled back user-db to stable version; Adjusted connection pool; Verified healthchecks and cleared backlog
rca_summary: MAX_CONNECTIONSs caused by dependency version bump — upstream timeouts were too tight and the DB pool exhausted before autoscaling caught up. Mitigated by scaling resources.
